quick_hits.text: GSA's Login.gov, which received $187 million in modernization funds, still lacks partner timelines for fixing agency-reported technical issues, GAO warns.

source.title: Identity Verification: GSA Needs to Address Fraud Threats and Technical Issues

quick_hits.text: GAO found 117 cybersecurity regulations from 37 federal agencies create potentially duplicative reporting burdens across nine critical infrastructure sectors, with 70 percent containing overlapping requirements.

source.title: Cybersecurity Regulations: Multiple Sectors Are Subject to Potentially Duplicative Reporting Requirements

quick_hits.text: John Deere Receivables LLC filed an 8-K with the SEC on July 22, 2026, disclosing financial statements and exhibits in a 298 KB filing.
U.S. banking agencies issued a joint statement establishing new protocols for handling highly sensitive information during bank examinations.

source.title: Agencies issue joint statement on handling of highly sensitive information during bank examinations

quick_hits.text: The Federal Open Market Committee met June 16–17, 2026, to deliberate on U.S. monetary policy and interest rate decisions.

source.title: Minutes of the Federal Open Market Committee, June 16-17, 2026

quick_hits.text: The Federal Reserve has announced leadership and objectives for new task forces aimed at advancing how it conducts monetary policy.

source.title: Federal Reserve announces the leadership and objectives of its task forces to advance the conduct of monetary policy

quick_hits.text: U.S. selected services revenue rose 1.1% in Q1 2026 to $6,223.1 billion, up 6.5% from a year earlier.
The Federal Reserve is seeking public comment on a proposal requiring payment stablecoin issuers to establish formal customer identification programs.

source.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program

quick_hits.text: Former Ferrari F1 boss Jean Todt says everyday road commuting is statistically more dangerous than decades spent in motorsport's deadliest environments.

source.title: A former Ferrari boss has a blunt message: Your commute is more dangerous than his old job

voice_blocks.title: This Day
voice_blocks.text: 2019: Chandrayaan-2, the second lunar exploration mission developed by Indian Space Research Organisation after Chandrayaan-1 is launched from Satish Dhawan Space Centre in a GSLV Mark III M1. It consists of a lunar orbiter, and also included the Vikram lander, and the Pragyan lunar rover.

closer.text: "Knowledge will forever govern ignorance; and a people who mean to be their own governors must arm themselves with the power which knowledge gives."
closer.attribution: James Madison, letter to W.T. Barry (1822)

source.title: James Madison, letter to W.T. Barry (1822)

receipt.title: Firearms Education: ATF Should Use Performance Metrics and Information to Evaluate and Manage Outreach Campaign
receipt.description:
What GAO Found

Since 2000, the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) and the National Shooting Sports Foundation (NSSF) have managed and launched the Don’t Lie for the Other Guy c

source.title: Firearms Education: ATF Should Use Performance Metrics and Information to Evaluate and Manage Outreach Campaign
